questionHtml:
Chlorofluorocarbons (CFCs) contain bonds of the following lengths:

C—C = 1.54 × 10−10 m

C—F = 1.38 × 10−10 m

C—Cl = 1.77 × 10−10 m

What is the order of increasing bond strength in the CFC molecule?

 

A.   C—C  <  C—F  <  C—Cl

B.   C—C  <  C—Cl <  C—F

C.   C—Cl <  C—C  <  C—F

D.   C—F  <  C—C  <  C—Cl
